name: Zendesk
description: Look up and create support tickets, search customers, and read agent activity. After creating, update the base URL in Settings to your own Zendesk subdomain.

auth.hint: Generate an OAuth token in Admin Center → Apps → OAuth Clients, or use an API Token via Basic Auth (email/token:API_TOKEN) configured after creation.

tools.name: list_tickets
tools.description: List recent support tickets with their subject, status, priority, and requester.

params.name: sort_by
params.description: Sort field: created_at, updated_at, priority, or status

tools.name: get_ticket
tools.description: Get all details for a specific ticket: description, status, assignee, and conversation history.

tools.name: create_ticket
tools.description: Open a new support ticket on behalf of a customer.

params.name: ticket
params.description: Ticket data, e.g. {"subject":"Login issue","comment":{"body":"User cannot log in"},"priority":"high","tags":["login","urgent"]}

tools.name: search_tickets
tools.description: Search across tickets, users, and organizations using Zendesk query syntax.

params.name: sort_by
params.description: Sort by: created_at, updated_at, or score

tools.name: list_users
tools.description: List Zendesk users (agents and customers) with their name, email, and role.

params.name: role
params.description: Filter by role: end-user, agent, or admin
